'''âw-p-sh''' ('''kawapash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whiplash|whiplash]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whiplash|whiplash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-p-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawapash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwapash|thiwapash]] || [[word:jiwapash|jiwapash]] || [[word:shiwapash|shiwapash]] || [[word:kiwapash|kiwapash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwapash|thuthuwapash]] || [[word:jujuwapash|jujuwapash]] || [[word:shushuwapash|shushuwapash]] || [[word:kukuwapash|kukuwapash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwapash|thuwapash]] || [[word:juwapash|juwapash]] || [[word:shuwapash|shuwapash]] || [[word:kuwapash|kuwapash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwapash|thuwapash]] || [[word:juwapash|juwapash]] || [[word:shuwapash|shuwapash]] || [[word:kuwapash|kuwapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewapash|thewapash]] || [[word:jewapash|jewapash]] || [[word:shewapash|shewapash]] || [[word:kewapash|kewapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowapash|thothowapash]] || [[word:jojowapash|jojowapash]] || [[word:shoshowapash|shoshowapash]] || [[word:kokowapash|kokowapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowapash|thowapash]] || [[word:jowapash|jowapash]] || [[word:showapash|showapash]] || [[word:kowapash|kowapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowapash|thowapash]] || [[word:jowapash|jowapash]] || [[word:showapash|showapash]] || [[word:kowapash|kowapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwapash|thĂŠwapash]] || [[word:jĂŠwapash|jĂŠwapash]] || [[word:shĂŠwapash|shĂŠwapash]] || [[word:kĂŠwapash|kĂŠwapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawapash|thathawapash]] || [[word:jajawapash|jajawapash]] || [[word:shashawapash|shashawapash]] || [[word:kakawapash|kakawapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawapash|thawapash]] || [[word:jawapash|jawapash]] || [[word:shawapash|shawapash]] || [[word:kawapash|kawapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawapash|thawapash]] || [[word:jawapash|jawapash]] || [[word:shawapash|shawapash]] || [[word:kawapash|kawapash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawapash|shawapash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawapash|goshawapash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawapash|gokishawapash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawapashnĂŒ|shawapashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawapashnknĂŒ|goshawapashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapashnĂŒ|gokishawapashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawapashĂ«|shawapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawapashnkshĂ«|goshawapashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawapashĂ«|gokishawapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapashro|shawapashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapashnkro|goshawapashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapashro|gokishawapashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapashmu|shawapashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapashnkmu|goshawapashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapashmu|gokishawapashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawapasher|shawapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawapashnksher|goshawapashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawapasher|gokishawapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawapashng|shawapashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawapashnkng|goshawapashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawapashng|gokishawapashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawapashya|shawapashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawapashnkya|goshawapashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawapashya|gokishawapashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawapashyam|shawapashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawapashnkyam|goshawapashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawapashyam|gokishawapashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapashnĂŒshĂ«|shawapashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawapashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawapashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapashnĂŒro|shawapashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapashnknĂŒro|goshawapashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapashnĂŒro|gokishawapashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapashnĂŒmu|shawapashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapashnknĂŒmu|goshawapashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapashnĂŒmu|gokishawapashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapashĂ«nĂŒ|shawapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawapashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapashĂ«ro|shawapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapashnkshĂ«ro|goshawapashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapashĂ«ro|gokishawapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapashĂ«mu|shawapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapashnkshĂ«mu|goshawapashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapashĂ«mu|gokishawapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapashronĂŒ|shawapashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapashnkronĂŒ|goshawapashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapashronĂŒ|gokishawapashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapashroshĂ«|shawapashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapashnkroshĂ«|goshawapashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapashroshĂ«|gokishawapashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapashromu|shawapashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapashnkromu|goshawapashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapashromu|gokishawapashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapashmunĂŒ|shawapashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapashnkmunĂŒ|goshawapashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapashmunĂŒ|gokishawapashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapashmushĂ«|shawapashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapashnkmushĂ«|goshawapashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapashmushĂ«|gokishawapashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapashmuro|shawapashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapashnkmuro|goshawapashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapashmuro|gokishawapashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
